rationale: All required content is present and correct: 'Dr. Maya Chen' bold white, 'Climate Scientist, NOAA' in muted gray, a teal vertical accent bar, positioned in the lower-left safe area on the #0E1116 background. The filmstrip matches the choreography: tile 1 empty (0.4s hold), tile 2 shows the accent bar leading alone, tiles 3-9 hold the full lower third, and tile 10 shows a clean fade-out, with the final still fully empty at 5.0s. Composition is tight and hierarchical with the bar neatly spanning both text lines, nothing clipped. The stagger and fades read well, though the in/out easing and slide subtlety can't be fully verified from 0.5s-spaced tiles, and the type treatment is clean but fairly default; one light finishing pass away from broadcast-perfect.
